DebugWarning: Please note you have debug mode turned on. It isn't recommended to leave this on unless you have a purpose for it.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write detailed diagnostic info to the BepInEx log while you play. Turn this on before reporting a bug.
cfg.modify_player_gardens.name: Modify Player Gardens
cfg.modify_player_gardens.desc: On: your own garden plots drop a fairer amount of seeds - at minimum the same number you planted, plus a bonus. Off: vanilla seed yields apply to your gardens.
cfg.modify_zombie_gardens.name: Modify Zombie Gardens
cfg.modify_zombie_gardens.desc: On: zombie garden beds return at least as many seeds as you fed in, plus a bonus, so they do not bleed your seed stock dry. Off: vanilla zombie garden yields apply.
cfg.modify_zombie_vineyards.name: Modify Zombie Vineyards
cfg.modify_zombie_vineyards.desc: On: zombie vineyards return at least as many seeds as you fed in, plus a bonus. Off: vanilla zombie vineyard yields apply.
cfg.modify_refugee_gardens.name: Modify Refugee Gardens
cfg.modify_refugee_gardens.desc: On: refugee garden plots return at least as many seeds as you fed in, plus a bonus. Off: vanilla refugee garden yields apply.
cfg.add_waste_to_zombie_gardens.name: Add Waste To Zombie Gardens
cfg.add_waste_to_zombie_gardens.desc: On: zombie garden harvests also drop 3-5 crop waste, which is otherwise hard to come by. Off: zombie gardens drop only their normal output.
cfg.add_waste_to_zombie_vineyards.name: Add Waste To Zombie Vineyards
cfg.add_waste_to_zombie_vineyards.desc: On: zombie vineyards also drop 3-5 crop waste per harvest. Off: zombie vineyards drop only their normal output.
cfg.boost_potential_seed_output.name: Boost Potential Seed Output
cfg.boost_potential_seed_output.desc: On: lifts the upper end of every modified garden seed roll by an extra 2 (so the random max is +4 instead of +2). Off: keeps the smaller +2 bonus.
cfg.boost_grow_speed_when_raining.name: Boost Grow Speed When Raining
cfg.boost_grow_speed_when_raining.desc: On: garden, vineyard and refugee planting crafts grow twice as fast while it is raining. Off: rain has no effect on garden growth speed.
cfg.track_plant_cycles.name: Track Plant Cycles
cfg.track_plant_cycles.desc: On: every plant and harvest is recorded to BepInEx/plugins/TheSeedEqualizer/ledger.json - one entry per bed showing seeds in vs seeds returned, plus running totals per crop. Off: no tracking. Existing ledger file is preserved either way.
cfg.verbose_tracking_logs.name: Verbose Tracking Logs
cfg.verbose_tracking_logs.desc: On: each spend, harvest, and cancel is also written as an info line to the BepInEx log. Off: only file-write errors are logged. Independent of the main Debug Logging toggle in Advanced.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
